Pro tip for all you Brave Browser users 

You can right click on any DOM node in the developer tools/inspector and grab a screenshot of that node. 

Doing this on the <html> tag gives you a full-page screenshot

Apple buried a feature in Safari that nobody talks about.

Screenshot any website → tap "Full Page" → it captures the ENTIRE page as a photo or PDF.

I used it to clone 
@pumpfun
 design with Claude in 60 seconds.

No laptop? No problem. You too can vibe code from your phone.

The problem before was giving AI the proper context needed to understand the websites design.

Describing a page doesn't work. Multiple screenshots miss half the site. Copy pasting HTML is a mess.

One full page PDF gives Claude everything. 

Every section, every element. Single

other ways I use this daily 
— see a design I like → full page PDF → "build this" → clone in minutes
— spot a UI bug → capture the full page → "find and fix this" → done
— vibecode entire apps from a reference design
— audit mobile UX without devtools
— competitor

Introducing Universal Contract AI Interface (UCAI)

The first universal standard for connecting AI agents to smart contracts through the Model Context Protocol (MCP)

Up until today, no standard existed for AI-to-blockchain communication

Paste any contract address/ABI. Get a

Writing MCP servers manually takes 2-4 hours per contract. Mapping Solidity types to JSON Schema is error-prone. Safety patterns are easy to forget.

UCAI does it in 10 seconds.

One command. Every function, every event, every query becomes a 
@claudeai
 tool.

Web builder (no install): 
http://
mcp.ucai.tech

pip install abi-to-mcp
